case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ABRI JESAO CARRANZA

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED JUN-11-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARRANZA, ABRIL JESAO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARRANZA, ABRIL JESAO $652.71 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $737.71 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. HEARING SET FOR SEP-17-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY OPORTUN INC. IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO BE NAMED AS ABRIL JESAO CARRANZA. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS TEAM LEAD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ABRIL JESAO CARRANZA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ABRI JESAO CARRANZA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
